description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the php:5.6 Docker image with a mysql service and a cache of the vendor/ directory. Define variables MYSQL_DATABASE=hello_world_test and MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=mysql. In the default test stage add a test:mysql job that runs the global before_script (apt-get update -yqq, apt-get install git -yqq, docker-php-ext-install pdo_mysql, curl -sS https://getcomposer.org/installer | php, php composer.phar install) then executes vendor/bin/phpunit --configuration phpunit_mysql.xml --coverage-text. Also add a test:php7:mysql job that allows failure, uses the php:7 image, runs the same before_script and then vendor/bin/phpunit --configuration phpunit_mysql.xml --coverage-text. No artifacts, caches beyond vendor/, or rules are required.
